scorza23: folds

Zenith1865: checks

PassoniRafa: raises 430 to 510 and is all-in

Seat 1: scorza23 (40 in chips) 
Seat 2: Zenith1865 (1460 in chips) 
scorza23: posts small blind 15
Zenith1865: posts big blind 30
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to scorza23 [4h 9h]
scorza23: raises 10 to 40 and is all-in
Zenith1865: calls 10
*** FLOP *** [2s Ah 3d]
*** TURN *** [2s Ah 3d] [Ad]
*** RIVER *** [2s Ah 3d Ad] [8d]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
Zenith1865: shows [Ts Js] (a pair of Aces)
scorza23: shows [4h 9h] (a pair of Aces - lower kicker)
Zenith1865 collected 80 from pot
scorza23 finished the tournament in 2nd place
Zenith1865 wins the tournament - congratulations!
Zenith1865 wins a '$1.00 Power Path Step 2 Ticket' ticket
